concept: What if there was a game where you oversee an underground civilization of luminescent fungi developing cultural sophistication in total darkness? Guide their evolution from simple spore clusters to complex networked communities by influencing environmental factors and resource distribution. Defend your glowing society against cave-dwelling predators and competing bioluminescent species through symbiotic relationships and chemical defenses. Eventually, prepare your fungal civilization for the ultimate challenge—contact with surface dwellers who threaten to expose their hidden world to destructive sunlight.
